changelog_signals.title: Obsidian 1.9.10 Desktop (Public)
changelog_signals.snippet: * New **Footnotes view** core plugin adds a new sidebar tab that helps you manage footnotes for the current file without losing your place in the note. * Sync history view now includes a button to open affected files in File Recovery. * File Explorer: When the view is active, holding `Command/Ctrl` while navigating through files using the arrow keys will now open the file under the cursor. * File

changelog_signals.title: Obsidian 1.10.0 Desktop (Early access)
changelog_signals.snippet: A new "Toggle light/dark mode" command has been added. This release introduces tons of new features and improvements to Bases. * New List view lets you display files as bulleted lists and numbered lists. This is an official open source plugin that also provides an example of how developers can implement new view types for Bases. * Clicking the ribbon item with modifier keys opens the file in a new

changelog_signals.title: Obsidian 1.11.0 Desktop (Early access)
changelog_signals.snippet: Follow Obsidian updates and improvements. * Added icons to settings sections. * Markdown links are now supported in text and list properties.
